title: Session delete removes a saved session
description: Black-box smoke for `armature session delete <id>` using an isolated ARMATURE_HOME.
input: Create a saved session, run `armature session delete demo`, and verify the file is removed while the CLI prints the deleted session id.
command:
bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_HOME=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_HOME" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_HOME/.armature/sessions"; cat > "$TMP_HOME/.armature/sessions/2026-04-15T00-00-00-demo.json" <<'"'"'EOF'"'"'
{
  "provider": "openai",
  "model": "gpt-5.4",
  "history": [{"role": "user", "content": "hello from session"}],
  "stats": {"turns": 1, "inputTokens": 10, "outputTokens": 20},
  "savedAt": "2026-04-15T00:00:00.000Z"
}
EOF
OUTPUT=$(env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_HOME" ARMATURE_HOME="$TMP_HOME/.armature" node dist/bin/armature.js session delete demo); printf "%s\n" "$OUTPUT"; test ! -f "$TMP_HOME/.armature/sessions/2026-04-15T00-00-00-demo.json"'
